steps.title: Count the additional days
steps.content: The first day costs $300$ dollars. If the rental lasts $x$ days, the number of additional days is $x-1$, and each additional day costs $150$ dollars.

steps.title: Build the cost expression
steps.content: The total cost is +$$y=300+150(x-1)$$ +$$y=300+150x-150$$ +$$y=150x+150$$ +The answer is D.
